query:
INSERT INTO users (name, email)
     VALUES ($1, $2)
     ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name
     RETURNING id AS user_id, name AS user_name, email AS user_email, role AS user_role
inlineQueries:
INSERT INTO users (name, email)
     VALUES ($1, $2)
     ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name
     RETURNING id AS user_id, name AS user_name, email AS user_email, role AS user_role
